headline: AI stocks tumble again
detail: AI and tech names are facing another broad selloff, which hits your entire book directly. PLTR, AVGO, and CRWD are all already in the red for you, and a second consecutive down day in this sector increases the risk of stop levels getting tested. On margin, each percent lower costs you more than it reads.

headline: SpaceX space stocks getting punished
detail: The headline says SpaceX FOMO is over and space stocks broadly are being sold off today. This hits both SPCX, your brand-new IPO position, and SPAL, your 2x leveraged SpaceX ETF, at the same time. SPAL at $20.71 is uncomfortably close to its $19 stop and the leveraged structure means the damage compounds intraday.

headline: Friday is a massive volume event
detail: Wall Street's version of roster-cut day hits Friday and it's expected to be one of the highest-volume days of the year. Big volume days on a weak tape can trigger sharp intraday moves and stop cascades. With several positions already near stop levels, this timing adds urgency to your position review today.

headline: Oil slides 2%, Iran deal in focus
detail: Oil dropping 2% signals markets are pricing in eased Middle East risk despite the Iran news, which is broadly a mild macro positive. However, the Hormuz ship attack headline introduces a wildcard - any escalation there could spike energy prices and rattle an already nervous market, adding another layer of uncertainty to a fragile tape.
